articles.title_en: Department of Business Development Reclaims Dignity of Thai Aromatic Coconut, Pushes Back to Top List
articles.summary_en: The Department of Business Development is working to restore the reputation and market position of Thai aromatic coconuts. The initiative aims to bring Thai aromatic coconuts back to prominence in the market.

articles.title_en: Department of Business Development Visits Ratchaburi Province to Solve Low Aromatic Coconut Price Problem, Addresses 'Nominee' Issues
articles.summary_en: The Department of Business Development conducted a field visit to Ratchaburi Province to tackle the problem of falling aromatic coconut prices and resolve nominee-related issues. This represents direct government intervention to help local farmers and address business irregularities.

articles.title_en: Department of Business Development Reveals Thai Aromatic Coconut Supply Chain - Root Cause of Heavy Price Fluctuations
articles.summary_en: The Department of Business Development disclosed information about the Thai aromatic coconut supply chain, identifying it as the main cause of severe price volatility. The revelation aims to address structural issues affecting price stability.

articles.title_en: Department of Business Development Finds 15 Fruit Trading Companies in Aromatic Coconut Business at Risk of Being Nominees
articles.summary_en: The Department of Business Development discovered 15 fruit trading companies involved in the aromatic coconut business that are suspected of being nominee companies. This finding indicates potential foreign ownership violations in the industry.

articles.title_en: Department of Business Development Visits Ratchaburi Province to Solve Low Aromatic Coconut Price Problem, Addresses 'Nominee' Issues
articles.summary_en: The Department of Business Development conducted a field visit to Ratchaburi Province to tackle falling aromatic coconut prices and resolve nominee company issues. This is a duplicate report of the same government intervention efforts.

articles.title_en: Orders Strike Against 15 Nominee Companies Disguised as Aromatic Coconut Traders, Extends Legal Action Decisively
articles.summary_en: Authorities have ordered decisive action against 15 nominee companies that were operating illegally in the aromatic coconut trade. Legal proceedings will be expanded and pursued thoroughly against these violators.

articles.title_original: เผยผลตรวจสอบพบล้งมะพร้าวเข้าข่ายนอมินี 15 แห่ง คนไทยให้การสนับสนุน 10 ราย - ประชาไท Prachatai.com

articles.title_en: Investigation Results Reveal 15 Coconut Warehouses Suspected of Being Nominees, with 10 Thai Supporters
articles.summary_en: Investigation findings show 15 coconut warehouses are suspected of being nominee operations, with 10 Thai nationals providing support. This reveals the extent of nominee arrangements in the coconut industry.

articles.title_original: เปิดห่วงโซ่มะพร้าวน้ำหอมไทย ต้นเหตุเกษตรกรขายได้แค่ 2–5 บาทต่อผล - posttoday

articles.title_en: Revealing Thai Aromatic Coconut Supply Chain - Root Cause Why Farmers Can Only Sell for 2-5 Baht Per Fruit
articles.summary_en: The investigation exposes the Thai aromatic coconut supply chain structure that forces farmers to sell their produce for only 2-5 baht per fruit. This reveals the exploitation of farmers within the current market system.

articles.title_original: พาณิชย์เร่งแก้วิกฤตมะพร้าวน้ำหอมไทย สกัดนอมินี–ปราบสินค้าปลอม เดินหน้าหาตลาดส่งออกใหม่ - TNN

articles.title_en: Ministry of Commerce Rushes to Solve Thai Aromatic Coconut Crisis, Blocks Nominees and Crushes Counterfeit Products, Moves Forward to Find New Export Markets
articles.summary_en: The Ministry of Commerce is urgently addressing the Thai aromatic coconut crisis through multiple measures including blocking nominee companies, combating counterfeit products, and seeking new export markets. This represents a comprehensive approach to industry reform.

articles.summary_en: The Department of Business Development is actively working to resolve the issue of low aromatic coconut prices while simultaneously cracking down on nominee companies. This shows coordinated efforts to address both price and regulatory issues.

articles.title_en: Commerce Ministry unveils plan to support aromatic coconut! Implements measures to 'absorb millions of coconuts' to combat 3-round price slump
articles.summary_en: The Commerce Ministry announces support measures to absorb millions of aromatic coconuts in response to falling prices over three periods.

articles.title_original: พาณิชย์ ลุยกวาดล้าง 15 นอมินี ต้นเหตุราคามะพร้าวน้ำหอมผันผวน | การเงินธนาคาร - LINE TODAY
articles.description_original: พาณิชย์ ลุยกวาดล้าง 15 นอมินี ต้นเหตุราคามะพร้าวน้ำหอมผันผวน | การเงินธนาคาร  LINE TODAY
articles.title_en: Commerce Ministry cracks down on 15 nominees causing aromatic coconut price volatility
articles.summary_en: The Commerce Ministry is pursuing action against 15 nominee companies that are causing price fluctuations in the aromatic coconut market.

articles.title_original: ฟัน 15 บริษัท ใช้คนไทยเป็นนอมินี "มะพร้าวน้ำหอม" กดราคารับซื้อ ทำราคาตลาดร่วง - www.thairath.co.th
articles.description_original: ฟัน 15 บริษัท ใช้คนไทยเป็นนอมินี "มะพร้าวน้ำหอม" กดราคารับซื้อ ทำราคาตลาดร่วง  www.thairath.co.th
articles.title_en: 15 companies penalized for using Thai nominees for 'aromatic coconut' business, suppressing purchase prices and causing market crash
articles.summary_en: Fifteen companies are being penalized for using Thai nominees to suppress aromatic coconut purchase prices, leading to a market price collapse.

articles.title_original: ​กรมพัฒน์ลุยจัดการต่างชาติใช้คนไทยเป็นนอมินี ทำธุรกิจมะพร้าวน้ำหอม จ.ราชบุรี - commercenewsagency
articles.description_original: ​กรมพัฒน์ลุยจัดการต่างชาติใช้คนไทยเป็นนอมินี ทำธุรกิจมะพร้าวน้ำหอม จ.ราชบุรี  commercenewsagency
articles.title_en: Department of Business Development tackles foreigners using Thai nominees for aromatic coconut business in Ratchaburi Province
articles.summary_en: The Department of Business Development is addressing cases of foreigners using Thai nominees to operate aromatic coconut businesses in Ratchaburi Province.

articles.title_original: ศุภจี จ่อหารือ ส.มะพร้าวน้ำหอมไทย ตั้ง 'ลังกลาง' ทางเลือกแก้ปัญหารับซื้อ
articles.title_en: Minister Suphajee to discuss with Thai Aromatic Coconut Association on setting up 'central crate' as solution for purchasing problems
articles.summary_en: Minister Suphajee announced plans to consult with the Thai Aromatic Coconut Association about establishing a 'central crate' system to help resolve coconut purchasing issues faced by farmers.

articles.title_original: "ศุภจี" เผย แนวคิด"ลังกลาง" เป็นทางเลือกแก้ปัญหารับซื้อ
articles.title_en: Minister reveals 'central crate' concept as option to resolve purchasing problems
articles.summary_en: The Commerce Minister clarified that there is no policy to cut coconut crate distributors from the system, and proposed a 'central crate' concept working with the Thai Aromatic Coconut Association.

articles.title_original: 'ศุภจี' ไฟเขียว ลุยแก้ปัญหา 'ลัง' มะพร้าวน้ำหอม ทุนข้ามชาติวางแผนจัดการ ตั้งแต่ต้นน้ำยันปลายน้ำ
articles.title_en: Minister greenlights tackling 'crate' problem — foreign capital plans management from upstream to downstream
articles.summary_en: Daily News reports Minister Suphajee greenlit addressing the aromatic coconut crate system, noting foreign investors' plans to manage the entire supply chain from upstream to downstream.

articles.title_original: พบ 10 คนไทย หนุน 15 บริษัท เอี่ยวนอมินีธุรกิจมะพร้าวน้ำหอม
articles.title_en: 10 Thai nationals found backing 15 companies linked to nominee operations in coconut business
articles.summary_en: DG Poonpong revealed 10 Thai nationals supporting 15 companies involved in nominee structures in the aromatic coconut industry, following a joint meeting with 10 government agencies.

articles.title_original: กรมพัฒน์ฯ ร่วม 10 หน่วยงานแก้ปัญหามะพร้าวน้ำหอม เจอนอมินี
articles.title_en: Department of Business Development joins 10 agencies to tackle coconut problems, finds nominees
articles.summary_en: Prachachat reports the Department found 15 companies using Thai nationals as nominees, engaging in practices like leasing orchards to grow and sell coconuts themselves, bypassing local farmers.

articles.title_original: พาณิชย์ พบลังผลไม้ 15 บริษัทเอี่ยวนอมินี กดราคามะพร้าว
articles.title_en: Commerce Ministry finds 15 fruit crate companies linked to nominees suppressing coconut prices
articles.summary_en: Thansettakij reports the Commerce Ministry discovered 15 fruit crate companies connected to nominee operations unfairly suppressing coconut purchase prices from farmers.

articles.title_original: ข่าวรายงานพิเศษ : จี้รัฐฯ ใช้ยาแรงปราบนอมินีมะพร้าวน้ำหอม
articles.title_en: Special Report: Urging government to use strong measures against aromatic coconut nominees
articles.summary_en: Channel 7 evening news special report highlighting Thai aromatic coconut farmers facing severe price drops, urging government to take strong action against nominee operations.

articles.title_original: "ศุภจี" สยบดราม่า 239 ลั่งขู่หยุดซื้อ ชี้ใครทำสั่งปิดแน่!
articles.title_en: Minister quells drama over 239 crates threatening to stop buying — warns violators face closure
articles.summary_en: DG Poonpong addressed controversy over 239 coconut crate operators threatening to stop purchasing, warning violators will face mandatory closure while focusing on solving root problems.

articles.title_original: กรมพัฒนาธุรกิจการค้า บุกราชบุรี แก้ปัญหาราคามะพร้าวน้ำหอมตกต่ำ ปราบนอมินี
articles.title_en: Dept. of Business Development raids Ratchaburi to address falling coconut prices and crack down on nominees
articles.summary_en: Official press release: DG Poonpong led inspection of coconut packing/export facilities in Ratchaburi, revealing nominee structures and announcing enforcement against 15 companies.

articles.title_original: กรมพัฒนาธุรกิจการค้า ฟัน 15 บริษัทนอมินี "มะพร้าวน้ำหอม" ต่างชาติสวมสิทธิ์คนไทย
articles.title_en: Dept. takes action against 15 nominee companies — foreigners using Thai rights
articles.summary_en: DG Poonpong revealed 15 companies where foreign investors used Thai nominee structures to control the coconut supply chain.

articles.title_original: คอลัมน์การเมือง - ศุภจี กับอนาคตมะพร้าวน้ำหอมไทย
articles.title_en: Political Column: Suphajee and the future of Thai aromatic coconut
articles.summary_en: Political column analyzing Minister Suphajee's approach to the coconut crisis, examining relations between farmers, crate operators, and export markets.
